extension.description: Professional multi-account management & AI token economy for Anbutech IDE
config.autoRefreshInterval.description: Time interval (minutes) for automatic account quota info refresh. Set to 0 to disable.
config.switchMode.description: Account switching mode: 'safe' only switches the current account and prompts for manual IDE restart; 'advanced' performs Kill → Database Injection → Auto Restart.
config.databasePathOverride.description: Global status database path override for Anbutech IDE (leave empty for platform default).
config.antigravityExecutablePath.win32.d: Anbutech.exe path override for Windows (leave empty for default).
Anbutech.app path override for macOS (leave empty for default).
config.antigravityExecutablePath.linux.d: Anbutech executable path override for Linux (leave empty for default).
config.processWaitSeconds.description: Time to wait (seconds) for process closing/starting during account switching.
